name: Sky Rhythm
short_description: sprint, jump, shuttle，and finally reach the end of the sky high!ヾ(๑╹◡╹)ﾉ"
detailed_description:
「Sky Rhythm」is a simple picture, pure play, but challenging action parkour game. Through keyboard and mouse operation - while avoiding falling into the void - quickly sprint, jump, shuttle between scenes, and finally reach the end of the sky high! The game scene is diverse, testing the player's reaction and precision. Come on, challenge and show off your skills! ψ(｀∇´)ψ

The game has a variety of special interaction blocks：

1.blue Block: Elastic Slime Block.
2.Yellow block: you can climb up near the yellow block, and you can click the Space key at any time to push off, and click the Space key again in the air to
jump again.
3.Orange block: After jumping on the orange block, press the W key to shuttle quickly along the orange block. At this time, click the R key to move up at
the same time, or click the F key to move down at the same time. Similarly, you can click the Space key at any time to push off, and click the
Space key again in the air to jump again.
4.Green block: When the crosshair is aligned with the green block and it appears red, it means that the green block is selected, and then click and hold the
LefeMouse button to pull towards the green block.
5.Purple block: When the crosshair is aligned with the purple block and it is displayed as red, it means that the purple block is selected. At this time, click and
hold the RightMouse button to hang on the purple block. At this time, you can swing the purple block by clicking WAD key, click S key to extend the rope, or
click Space key to shorten the rope . (Note that the above are the default keys, you can change the keys in the Settings)

Players need to seize the moment, beware of obstacles and voidness, run, climb, pull and swing between these blocks, across different scenes and save parkour progress at each save point on the map, and finally reach the end point high in the sky.٩( 'ω' )و
